notice.displayName: Save time with an example of how this node works

auto.description: Looks for an input field called 'chatInput' that is coming from a directly connected Chat Trigger

guardrails.description: Looks for an input field called 'guardrailsInput' that is coming from a directly connected Guardrails Node

define.description: Use an expression to reference data in previous nodes or enter static text

text.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

systemPromptTemplate.description: Template string used for the system prompt. This should include the variable `{context}` for the provided context. For text completion models, you should also include the variable `{input}` for the user’s query.

batching.description: Batch processing options for rate limiting

batchSize.description: How many items to process in parallel. This is useful for rate limiting, but might impact the log output ordering.

delayBetweenBatches.description: Delay in milliseconds between batches. This is useful for rate limiting.
